title: Academic Dashboard
emptySchoolHint: Every day without classes and subjects configured costs you at registration time—use the setup guide above to stop the leaks.
branchRequiredCurriculum: Assign a branch to your profile to manage curriculum entries.
branchRequiredTimetable: Assign a branch to your profile to manage class timetables.
noSchoolLinkedDesc: Your account is not linked to a school yet.
linkSchoolForClasses: Link your account to a school to manage classes.
schoolRequiredOnboard: Your account needs a school assigned before onboarding students.
schoolRequiredImport: Assign a school and branch to your profile before importing students.
onboardDescription: Register the child, guardian contact details, home address, and any health notes in one form.
importDescription: Upload a CSV file to bulk-create students for your branch.
websiteDescription: Customize your school's public homepage, programs, gallery, and contact info.
settingsDescription: Configure school-wide preferences used across finance and operations.
currencyDescription: Choose the currency shown on fees, expenses, payroll, and parent payment screens. Defaults to US Dollars.
noApplicationsDesc: Online and manual applications will appear here
noCurriculumDesc: Add grade–subject mappings and optional syllabus notes.
curriculumDescription: Map subjects to grades and track syllabus content per branch.
curriculumSubjectsHint: Add subjects under Academic → Subjects before creating curriculum entries.
createSectionDesc: Create a section to organize classes
inviteFirstTeam: Invite your first teacher or staff member above
teamDescription: Invite teachers, finance officers, and other staff to {school}. Each person gets their own role-based dashboard.
noStudentsDesc: Onboard your first student and guardian to get started
invitationSent: Invitation sent. They'll receive an email with a link to set their password.
timetableDescription: Build weekly schedules per class. Add multiple subjects per period with custom times.
createClassesFirst: Create classes first, then build a weekly timetable for each class.
addSubjectsTimetableHint: Add subjects under Academic → Subjects before filling the timetable.
subject: Subject
periodModalDesc: Add one or more subjects for this period. Set start and end times for each lesson.
csvRequiredColumns: Required columns: first_name, last_name, date_of_birth, class, status
csvClassHint: class can be a class name or UUID.
